name: Preference Application
description: Retrieve multiple stored preferences to assemble a complete configuration

Default deploy target is Fly.io with auto-scaling enabled
Database preference: PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector extension
Testing framework: vitest with coverage threshold at 80%
